entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The process of wearing away of topsoil affecting rural livelihoods in Ethiopia

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where soil erosion assessment and review were conducted

entities.name: GEOSPATIAL ANALYSIS TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used for spatially distributed soil erosion assessment

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The amount of soil removed from a specific area, measured in t ha–1 y–1

entities.name: SEDIMENT YIELD
entities.description: The amount of sediment delivered to a specific point, measured in t ha–1 y–1

entities.name: REVISED UNIVERSAL SOIL LOSS EQUATION
entities.description: A model used to estimate soil loss, giving the highest estimate in the study

entities.name: FIELD-SURVEY APPROACHES
entities.description: Approaches based on field surveys giving the lowest soil loss estimates

entities.name: PLOT-LEVEL MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Measurements taken at the plot level giving the highest average net soil loss rate

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL NON-POINT SOURCE POLLUTION MODEL
entities.description: A model used to estimate soil erosion, giving the lowest average soil erosion rate

entities.name: MOIST AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONE
entities.description: A climatic zone in Ethiopia exhibiting the highest average soil erosion rate

entities.name: SUBMOIST ZONE
entities.description: A climatic zone in Ethiopia exhibiting the lowest average soil erosion rate

entities.name: ARID ZONE
entities.description: A climatic zone in Ethiopia exhibiting soil erosion rates

entities.name: COVER AND MANAGEMENT FACTORS
entities.description: Factors associated with the heterogeneity of sites and spatio-temporal dynamics of soil erosion
